title: 2026 Big Rig Day at Burnet Park
summary: The City of Syracuse Parks and Recreation Department will host Big Rig Day on May 16, 2026 at Burnet Park, a free community event featuring vehicles from city departments (Police, Fire, Public Works, Parks, Water) and local organizations. The event includes a sensory-friendly hour, carnival games, arts and crafts, and community resource information; Parks Commissioner Syeisha Byrd emphasizes cross-departmental collaboration and community engagement.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs

political_signal.description: Parks Commissioner publicly champions interdepartmental collaboration and community-centered programming; signals departmental coordination capability and youth/family engagement priority.
